title: cheiranthus wheeleri
intro: Cheiranthus wheeleri, commonly known as Wheeler's candytuft or Wheeler's cheiranthus, is a flowering plant that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a digestive aid and a diuretic. The health benefits of Cheiranthus wheeleri include its potential to treat conditions such as indigestion, bloating, and water retention. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
